fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the routing number.
The system copied the number from the No. field in the routing header. The program uses this field to assign the routing versions to the Routing Header table.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version code of the routing.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the routing version.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for this routing version.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of this routing version.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies in which order operations in the routing are performed.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date when the routing version card was last modified.
When you change information on the routing version card, the program automatically updates the Last Date Modified field to show the current system date.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign the routing version code.
